title: All you need: Horror
description: the best lightweight horror modpack for you and your friends
body:
### **“You were never alone. You just thought you were.”**
Enter a world where fear doesn’t wait for nightfall. Shadows of the Fog is a psychological horror survival modpack built on Forge 1.20.1, designed to make every moment feel unsafe. The line between hallucination and reality will blur as fog thickens, whispers echo, and something watches you from the trees.

With terrifying entities like Herobrine, The Knocker, and Box of Horrors' twisted legends, you'll never know what's lurking around the corner—or behind you. Mods like Paranoia and Face of Horror mess with your mind, delivering sudden jumpscares, creepy sounds, and darkness that devours light.

 # **🩸 Features:**
Creepy Stalkers – Haunting entities track your movements and vanish just out of sight.

Environmental Terror – Fog, darkness, and distortion to keep you guessing.

Jumpscares & Audio Triggers – Unexpected visuals and immersive sound design.

Legendary Monsters – Siren Head, Jeff the Killer, Slenderman & more via Box of Horrors.

True Darkness – Your torch is your only friend.

Survival Enhanced – No safe zones, no mercy.

## **⚙️ Recommended:**
Play with headphones and no music

Use a dark shader (e.g. Complementary Unbound or BSL with low brightness)

For even more tension: turn off your HUD and play in Hardcore
